1.content: Is Shawn a boy or a girl.
1.title: First question

info.brief_description: Young Shawn gets the power to swap attributes from one person to another.
info.description: Shawn is just a normal 20 year old college student who gets the ability to swap attributes between others. Whether its height, strength, intelligence, as long as it part of a human body Shawn can swap it. What kind of scenarios can Shawn get in.
